groups.coding: multiplicative: gate(toolcalling) × gate(struct_output) × gate(instruction_following) × gate(agentic_loop) × grade
groups.quality_decay: additive blend: (1−w)×capability_raw + w×qd_norm; qd_norm=fleet min-max of mean accuracy@depth; missing=fleet mean (neutral)

scoring.fleet: fleet_suitability = capability^w_cap × ctx_norm^w_ctx × slots_norm^w_slots × throughput^w_thru (geometric blend; capability dominates, context/slots modulate; ctx clamped at ctx_tier)
